title: I clear the hidden refusal. Yes is allowed.
subtitle: A release-and-allow method for the part of you that has quietly been saying no to wealth.
excerpt: A short energy statement practice from Day 20 of the MONEY program. Use when the conscious mind wants money but something keeps interfering, spending it before it settles, avoiding the decision, finding reasons it won't work.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 20 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure draws on The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

content.text: A three-minute energy statement from Day 20 of the MONEY program. The statement works on the quiet part of you that says no to money even when you want it. The part that spends a payment before it settles, puts off the next step, or finds a reason the chance isn't right.
I am ready to release every hidden refusal, every quiet no, every inherited block I can't yet name. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow a full, clear, open yes to wealth at every level. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Adapted from Day 20 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow framework draws on The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
